decision_commentary: Redesign scope correctly captures all required elements: original_sqm = 216, revised_sqm = 160, removed_elements = ['pool'], feedback_type = 'scope_reduction', rationale referencing DG-09 reject, redesigned_at timestamp. Key checks pass: pool is removed (removed_elements includes 'pool') and sqm reduced to 160 (within ~160 target). revised-architectural-design.json confirms full redesign: 3 bedrooms retained, pool bathroom eliminated, spaces proportionally reduced, structural notes updated to remove pool elements. Both redesign files are consistent and complete. Rationale is explicitly linked to DG-09 reject decision. State_sync scored 3 per simulated run note.
